children.heading: No Cost-sharing for Indians with income at or below 300 percent of poverty enrolled in coverage through a State Exchange
children.label: a No Cost-sharing for Indians with income at or below 300 percent of poverty enrolled in coverage through a State Exchange
children.text: For provisions prohibiting cost sharing for Indians enrolled in any qualified health plan in the individual market through an Exchange, see .section 18071(d) of title 42

children.heading: Payer of last resort
children.label: b Payer of last resort
children.text: Health programs operated by the Indian Health Service, Indian tribes, tribal organizations, and Urban Indian organizations (as those terms are defined in ) shall be the payer of last resort for services provided by such Service, tribes, or organizations to individuals eligible for services through such programs, notwithstanding any Federal, State, or local law to the contrary.section 1603 of this title
